subcodes.first_line: Hallowed praise, transcending the mention and utterance of all the peoples of the world, befitteth the Ancient Lord, Who adorneth the horizon of the heaven of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان اهل عالم مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که افق سماء عالم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
